## Summary
Senior Software Test Engineer with 25+ years across Microsoft, Smartsheet, OpenMarket, and mobile/console game ecosystems. Builds automation from scratch, elevates QA practices across organizations, and reduces time-to-release through tight feedback loops with stakeholders. Integrates AI tooling — including custom MCP-based agents — into testing and development workflows.

## Skills
**Test Automation** *(Expert)*: Karate, Playwright, Fit, JavaScript, IntelliJ, Vitest
**Manual & Exploratory Testing** *(Expert)*: Regression Testing, Negative Testing, UI Testing, Compatibility Testing, Ad-hoc Testing, Scenario-Based Testing, Browserstack
**API & Data Testing** *(Expert)*: REST APIs, SOAP, Postman, Data Interface Testing, Migration Testing, SQL string testing
**Performance & Load Testing** *(Advanced)*: Performance Testing, Load Testing, Stress Testing
**AI-Assisted Development & Testing** *(Advanced)*: Antigravity (AGY), ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, MCP agents, AI-based test generation, AI-based coding
**Test Planning & Process** *(Expert)*: Test Plans, Test Cases, Test Strategies, Coverage Analysis, Defect & Bug Tracking, Lifecycle Reporting, Documentation
**Debugging & Diagnostics** *(Advanced)*: WinDbg, Stack Trace Analysis, Symbol-connected builds, Splunk, Grafana, Graphite
**DevOps & Infrastructure** *(Intermediate)*: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Bash, TeamCity, Windows Deployment Services, Tomcat
**Platforms & Tools** *(Expert)*: Jira, Confluence, Team Foundation Server, Product Studio, Clarify, Right Now, Visual Studio, VS Code, Windows, Mac, Linux
**Training & Knowledge Management** *(Expert)*: New Hire Training, Process Documentation, Cross-Discipline Knowledge Sharing, Functional Requirements
